name: 4D BUILD - Star Wars R2-D2 Model Kit Puzzle 201pc
description: May the 4th be with you! For the Star Wars fan, this 4D Build R2-D2 is beckoning to be displayed on your shelf! Embark on an adventure with this Star Wars piece. This 4D Build model kit toy includes all the movie-quality details that you will recognize, plus glue and a stand! You get 6 sheets with 201 punch-out pieces and easy-assemble instructions. No tools required! R2-D2 measures 7.5 in x 7.3 in x 11 in (19 cm x 18.6 cm x 28 cm). Perfect as desk decor, home decor, room decor, game room decor or as Star Wars birthday decorations, display your model kit with pride. For new young fans of Star Wars, this model kit makes the perfect gift for any teen boys gift ideas. And for the original fans of the Star Wars action figures, it is the perfect adult toy, as well. Whether you love your lightsaber, The Mandalorian, Baby Yoda, Boba Fett, or Darth Vader – this 4D Build R2-D2 is for you. 4D Build also makes fantastic birthday gifts for men, gifts for women, gifts for boyfriend, and gifts for him! Also hobbies for adults, model building kits, and 3d puzzles for kids, and models for adults to build. Get out your lightsaber and Star Wars helmet for some action-packed fun and start building! Includes 6 Cardstock Sheets, Glue, Instructions
